title: SAGES Durg Teaching and Non Teaching Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 227 Lab Assistant, Assistant Teacher and More Posts
organization: Swami Atmanand Utkrisht English Medium School Management Committee, District-Durg
post_name: Lecturer, Teacher, Assistant Teacher, Physical Education Teacher, Computer Teacher, Lab Assistant, Librarian
short_info: SAGES Durg is hiring 227 contractual posts across 38 English Medium Schools in Durg district, last date 08 June 2026.

application_fee.details: The notification does not explicitly mention any application fee. Applications are to be submitted online free of charge at https://cgssa.in/sagesdurg/sagesdurg or durg.gov.in. No offline / postal applications are accepted.

age_limit.details: Age is calculated as on 01 January 2026.

vacancy_details.Minimum educational and professional qua: A Master's degree in English with a minimum second-class degree from a recognized university/institution and a B.Ed. are required. Only candidates with an entire education through English medium are eligible to apply.
Must have passed Master's degree in Hindi with minimum second division from a recognized University/Institute and B.Ed.
A minimum second-class Master's degree in Chemistry/Biochemistry from a recognized university/institution and a B.Ed. are required. Candidates with an English medium education are only eligible.

A Master's degree with at least a second-class degree in Physics/Electronics/Applied Physics/Nuclear Physics from a recognized university/institution and a B.Ed. are required. Candidates with their entire education in English medium are only eligible.

Botany / Zoology / Life Sciences / Biology / Genetics / Microbiology / Biotechnology / Molecular Biology / Plant Physiology from a recognized university / institute and Master's degree in Zoology or Botany with at least second division and B.Ed. is mandatory at the graduate level. Only candidates who have completed their education through English medium are eligible.

A minimum second-class Master's degree in Commerce/Cost Accounting/Financial Accounting (as a major) from a recognized university/institution and a B.Ed. are required. Only candidates with an English medium education are eligible.

A Master's degree in Mathematics/Applied Mathematics with a minimum second-division degree from a recognized university/institution and a B.Ed. are required. Candidates with an English medium education are only eligible.
Must have passed Master's degree in Sanskrit/Classics/Acharya with minimum second division from a recognized University/Institute and B.Ed.

A Master's degree with at least a second-class degree in Economics/Geography/Politics/History from a recognized university/institution and a B.Ed. are required. Candidates with an English medium education are only eligible.

1. A Bachelor's degree with at least a second-division degree in the relevant subject (Hindi/Sanskrit) from a recognized university/institution and a D.Ed./B.Ed./D.El.Ed. is mandatory. 2. Passing the TET at the pre-secondary level is mandatory.

1. Graduation from a recognized university/institute with a minimum of 45% marks and passing the D.Ed./B.Ed./D.El.Ed. examination is mandatory. 2. Teacher English (English literature must have been a subject at the graduate level). 3. Only candidates who have received their entire education through the English medium are eligible. 4. Passing the TET at the pre-secondary level is mandatory.

1. Graduation from a recognized university/institute with a minimum of 45% marks and passing the D.Ed./B.Ed./D.El.Ed. examination is mandatory. 2. Teacher of Social Science (at least one subject at the graduate level should be History, Geography, Economics, or Political Science). 3. Only candidates with English medium education are eligible. 4. Passing the Pre-Secondary TET is mandatory.

1. Graduation from a recognized university/institute with a minimum of 45% marks and passing the D.Ed./B.Ed./D.El.Ed. examination is mandatory. 2. Teacher Science (any two subjects from Chemistry, Botany, Zoology, Military Science, and Geology should be taken at the graduate level). 3. Only candidates who have completed their education through English medium are eligible. 4. Passing the Pre-Secondary TET is mandatory.

1. Graduation from a recognized university/institute with a minimum of 45% marks and passing the D.Ed./B.Ed./D.El.Ed. examination is mandatory. 2. For Mathematics Teacher (Mathematics along with Physics/Chemistry/Electronics/Computer Science/Statistics, Military Science/Geology at the graduate level). 3. Only candidates with English medium of education are eligible. 4. Passing the TET at the pre-secondary level is mandatory.

1. Passing the Higher Secondary Examination with a minimum of 45% marks from a recognized board and passing the D.Ed/D.El.Ed examination is mandatory. 2. Only candidates who have received their entire education through the English medium are eligible to apply. 3. Passing the Primary Level TET is mandatory.

1. Passed the Higher Secondary Examination from a recognized board with Biology/Mathematics as a subject group. 2. Only candidates who have received their entire education through English medium will be eligible to apply.

1. Passed the Higher Secondary Examination from a recognized board and graduated with a D.P.Ed. or B.P.Ed. 2. Only candidates who have received their entire education through the English medium are eligible to apply.

1. Graduate degree with at least second class in Computer Science/IT/Computer Applications from a recognized university/institute. 2. Candidates with English medium of instruction will be given preference.
1. A second-class bachelor's degree from a recognized university and a B.Livit. 2. English medium will be preferred.

selection_process: Selection will be merit-based (प्रावीण्य सूची). There is no provision for a written or oral examination. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their educational qualification marks as per the merit formula below.
Merit Formula - Weightage of Educational Qualification Marks:

Document verification will be done at the time of attendance. Selection is based on merit of total qualifying marks. Documents submitted at time of online application will be the only valid documents; separately submitted documents on verification day will not be considered.
how_to_apply: Candidates shall apply online only; no other mode of application will be accepted. Applications submitted by speed post, ordinary post, or any other offline medium are not valid and will not be considered. Candidates must apply only via the official online portal. Candidates are advised to apply well before the closing date and not wait till the last date.
Apply Online at: https://cgssa.in/sagesdurg/sagesdurg or https://durg.gov.in
For more information: Visit durg.gov.in or https://cgssa.in/sagesdurg/

For queries: Contact Office of District Education Officer / Secretary, Swami Atmanand Utkrisht School Management Committee, Jila Panchayat ke Samne, GE Road, Durg (CG) - Phone: 0788-2322345 | Email: [email protected]
important_instructions: This is a contractual appointment-appointments to contractual positions are purely temporary. They will not be eligible to claim similar positions in government service. Contractual appointment can be terminated at any time by the management based on conduct or work behavior, with 3 months' prior notice or 3 months' pay in lieu thereof. Candidate must be a मूल निवासी of Chhattisgarh state. Certificate issued by competent authority must be attached. Mandatory English Medium Requirement: Applicants must have completed the qualifying educational qualifications (from 6th grade to a postgraduate degree) in English medium. English medium will not be mandatory for Hindi and Sanskrit lecturers in 10th grade and all higher classes. All 38 SAGES schools in Durg district operate under the High Court of New Delhi's order (SLP(C) No. 19668/2022) regarding contractual appointments. Currently serving contractual teachers at SAGES cannot apply for the same-level posts; only for higher-level posts. Only online applications submitted on the given website are valid. Documents submitted at time of online form submission are the only valid documents for verification. Applicants will be called for document verification on the basis of their marks obtained in the qualifying examination. The number of posts advertised is subject to change - the total vacancy count may change. The selection committee's decision on appointment will be final and binding. Incomplete or erroneous applications will be summarily rejected without separate intimation. If only one application is received, the first application will be considered valid; subsequent applications will be treated as cancelled. After selection, appointees must submit a government medical board fitness certificate within 7 days of joining. Contractual employees are entitled only to monthly lump sum remuneration; no special pay, DA, HRA, or annual increment is applicable under the contract appointment. Candidates with SC/ST/OBC category must attach permanent caste certificate issued by a competent authority at the time of document verification. Any candidate found to have provided incorrect information or whose documents are found to have discrepancies will be disqualified without prior notice. After the final merit list, candidates on the waitlist will remain valid for 1 year from the date of result or until the next engagement exercise, whichever is earlier. All future notifications, corrigenda and updates will be published only on the official website. No separate communication will be sent via any other channel.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for SAGES Durg Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application is 08 June 2026 (till 12:00 midnight).

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in SAGES Durg Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 227 contractual vacancies are available across 38 Swami Atmanand English Medium Schools in Durg district.

faq.question: Q3. What posts are included in SAGES Durg Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The recruitment includes Lecturer, Teacher, Assistant Teacher, Physical Education Teacher, Computer Teacher, Lab Assistant, and Librarian posts.

faq.question: Q4. What is the selection process for SAGES Durg Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selection is purely merit-based, calculated from academic marks (10th, 12th, Graduation, PG). No written exam or interview will be conducted.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for SAGES Durg Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee. Candidates can apply online free of cost.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary for SAGES Durg posts?
faq.answer: Salary ranges from ₹22,400 (Librarian) to ₹38,100 (Lecturer) per month depending on the post.

faq.question: Q7. What is the age limit for SAGES Durg Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must be between 21 to 35 years as on 01 January 2026, with relaxation for reserved categories as per CG government rules.

faq.question: Q8. Is English medium education mandatory for SAGES Durg jobs?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates must have studied through English medium from Class 6 onwards for most posts (except Hindi and Sanskrit Lecturer up to Class 10).

faq.question: Q9. Who can apply for SAGES Durg Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Only candidates who are residents (domicile holders) of Chhattisgarh and meet the required educational qualifications and TET criteria can apply.

faq.question: Q10. How to apply for SAGES Durg Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates must apply online through the official portal at cgssa.in/sagesdurg or durg.gov.in. Offline applications are not accepted.
